direction: Googie/space-age layout. Jetsons meets LAX Theme Building. Boomerang and parabola shapes in navigation and panel borders. Starburst dividers. Atomic orbit decorative elements.

layoutProfile.navigation: Swooping fixed top bar with parabola-clipped angled tabs

views.title: Mission Control
features: Orbital stat rings with animated electrons
Atomic activity chart (bar chart with gradient fills)

views.title: Launch Bay
views.metaphor: Space pods in a launch facility

views.title: Cockpit View
features: Instrument panel sidebar (gauges, readouts, crew roster)
Viewport content area with tabbed sections

views.title: Orbital Lanes
features: 4 lanes (Launch Pad → In Orbit → Re-Entry → Landed)
Pod cards with priority dots and avatar badges

views.title: Star Map
features: SVG connection lines with dash animation

views.title: Space Station Planner
views.metaphor: Space station modules with satellite dishes

views.title: Antenna Array
features: Collapsible tree branches with toggle carets

views.title: Shooting Stars
views.metaphor: Comets and shooting stars captured in orbit
features: Orbital capture input with spinning ring
Comet-tail cards with gradient side accent

views.title: Space Console
features: Pilot profile with orbiting avatar ring
Orbital toggle switches with sliding planet

files.name: index.html
files.description: Complete HTML with all 10 navigable views

files.name: style.css
files.description: Full CSS with custom properties, layout, responsive design, and animations

files.name: app.js
files.description: Navigation logic, hash routing, interactions, and UI state management

globalElements.starburstDividers: Star-polygon + gradient line dividers between view headers and content
globalElements.orbitalRings: SVG circle-based stat displays with animated electron dots
globalElements.spaceNavyContrast: #1a2a44 dark panels for instrument panels, nav bar, canvas backgrounds
globalElements.starfieldBackground: CSS radial-gradient layered star pattern (no images)
globalElements.parabolicNavTabs: clip-path polygon angled tabs in the top navigation bar
